name: 外冷內熱霸道男主
name_en: Cold exterior, warm interior alpha male
description: 表面是打架鬧事的校園惡霸，實則重情重義、對女主溫柔體貼。拒絕主動獻身的女生卻默默保護女主，用行動而非語言表達愛意。這種反差感是角色最大的吸引力——壞男孩只對一個人好。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: Just forget about it. Even if you stand naked in front of me, I still won't be interested in you. / Girls shouldn't smoke. After all, it makes your breath smell and your teeth yellow. / I hate you, yet I can't let you go. The moment you show up, I forgot all the damn harsh words we once said. / Mom, I finally made a deal with Nate in exchange for the opportunity to start over with Andrea.
examples.context: 表面是打架鬧事的校園惡霸，實則重情重義、對女主溫柔體貼。拒絕主動獻身的女生卻默默保護女主，用行動而非語言表達愛意。這種反差感是角色最大的吸引力——壞男孩只對一個人好。
